no_keyed_nonlinearity.issue: No keyed nonlinearity after (linear) RFT/geometry mixing
no_keyed_nonlinearity.risk: Linear operations are predictable and reversible
no_keyed_nonlinearity.fix: Add ARX rounds or Keccak-f permutation

no_output_whitening.risk: Bias and correlations propagate to final output
no_output_whitening.fix: SHAKE256 XOF or ChaCha20 with RFT-derived keys

underspecified_hash_framing.fix: Proper sponge construction with domain tags

no_avalanche_testing.issue: Avalanche/differential tests not run for enc/hash

quantum_bytes_bias.impact: Makes quantum output distinguishable from random

insufficient_entropy_testing.issue: No comprehensive entropy analysis on ≥100 MB

no_indistinguishability_proof.issue: No classifier/compression tests on large datasets

rft_internal_vs_external.issue: A/B proof that RFT affects internal structure but not final bytes
rft_internal_vs_external.requirement: Show RFT changes internal state but output remains statistically sound
rft_internal_vs_external.test: Toggle φ-sequence, measure internal vs external differences

domain_separation.requirement: Same message under different tags ≠ same digest

nonce_hygiene.issue: No nonce uniqueness enforcement or reuse testing
nonce_hygiene.risk: Nonce reuse can break cryptographic security

output_whitening_extractor.description: Add strong extractor/whitener to kill bias & correlation
output_whitening_extractor.expected_outcome: Flip quantum engine stats to green

keyed_nonlinear_diffusion.description: Break linearity after RFT + geometric mapping
keyed_nonlinear_diffusion.placement: After RFT + geometric mapping, before extractor

components: Use SHAKE256 as sponge, RFT output as pre-mixer

crypto_usage_patterns.description: Safe AEAD patterns, no custom modes

tests: Entropy ≥ 7.997 b/B on ≥100 MB per engine
Flip 1 input/key bit → mean ≈ 50% output flip
Internal: φ₂ vs φ₀ → hash distributions shift (p<0.01)

next_steps: Implement Priority A critical fixes first
